{{Dialogue|Filla|Admiral, this is Captain Celchu.|Tycho Celchu|Reporting as ordered, sir.|Ackbar|At ease, Mr. Celchu. You may leave us, Lieutenant.|attr=Filla, Tycho Celchu and Admiral Ackbar|src=<ref name="RS" />}}
'''Filla''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="RS" /> In [[6 ABY/Legends|6.5 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' in [[6 ABY/Legends|6.5 ABY]].</ref> Filla was serving as the aide of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]],<ref name="RS" /> the [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Forces]],<ref name="HttE">''[[Heir to the Empire]]''</ref> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Folor]]. When Ackbar was in a meeting with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Horton Salm/Legends|Horton Salm]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] regarding the reformation of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] Admiral asked Filla to find [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] and bring him to the Admiral's office. At the [[Time/Legends|time]], Captain Celchu was in the [[Folor Base|base's]] [[Flight simulator/Legends|flight simulator]] complex helping train the recruits. Filla brought Celchu to Ackbar's office and was dismissed before they continued their meeting.<ref name="RS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Filla appeared in the first novel of the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''X-wing'']] series, ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'', written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]] and released in [[1996]].<ref name="RS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
